objectives.text: 掌握过去进行时的构成（was/were + doing）
了解过去进行时的用法和标志词
掌握 when 和 while 的用法

blocks.content: 过去进行时由 **was/were + 动词-ing** 构成：

rows: I/He/She/It
was
I was reading a book.
You/We/They
were
They were playing football.

blocks.title: 记忆技巧
blocks.content: was 用于 I/he/she/it，were 用于 you/we/they。与 am/is/was 的对应关系一致。
过去进行时主要用于以下场景：

rows: 过去某时刻正在进行
At 8:00 last night, I was studying.
强调过去某时刻的动作
when 引导的时间状语从句
When I arrived, he was sleeping.
when 从句用一般过去时
while 引导的时间状语从句
While I was cooking, the phone rang.
while 从句用过去进行时

blocks.title: 易错提醒
blocks.content: when 引导的从句用一般过去时，while 引导的从句用过去进行时。
过去进行时的常见标志词：

rows: at that time
At that time, I was working.
at 8:00 last night
At 8:00 last night, she was watching TV.
when
When he came in, I was reading.
while
While I was sleeping, it started to rain.

blocks.title: 记忆口诀
blocks.content: at that time, at + 过去时间点，when 和 while 是好朋友。

solution.content: at 9:00 last night 表示过去某时刻，用过去进行时。you 用 were，do 的现在分词是 doing。答案选 B。

examples.title: 例2：when 和 while 的区别

problem.content: ___ I was watching TV, my mother came home.

solution.content: my mother came home 是短暂动作，用 when 引导。while 引导的从句用过去进行时，表示较长的动作。答案选 A。

children.text: 过去某时刻正在进行的动作
when 引导的时间状语从句
while 引导的时间状语从句
at that time, at + 过去时间点
